signature: static int xmlParseTryOrFinish(xmlParserCtxtPtr ctxt, int terminate)
params: ctxt: xmlParserCtxtPtr - the XML push-parser context; the sink reads its input buffer via ctxt->input->cur
terminate: int - last-chunk indicator for the progressive/push parse
harness_callchain: LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput -> xmlCreatePushParserCtxt -> xmlParseChunk(...,0) loop and xmlParseChunk(NULL,0,1) -> xmlParseTryOrFinish(ctxt, terminate) -> XML_PARSER_CDATA_SECTION branch: xmlCheckCdataPush returns negative -> ctxt->input->cur += tmp; goto encoding_error -> snprintf reads ctxt->input->cur[0..3] past ctxt->input->end (OOB READ)
